name_en: 💋💋💋 [Full set of counter packaging, premium hardware, original leather] Sheepskin Hobo Shoulder Bag ~ Vintage, this Hobo shoulder bag exudes a charming modern urban vibe. The multi-pocket design blurs the line between function and decoration, and the iconic engraved logo injects distinct personality. Gold accessories add a sparkling touch.
